ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date when the review was posted */,
  "review_location" TEXT /* The location from where the review was posted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the review (1: positive, 0: neutral, -1: negative) */,
  "neg" REAL /* Negative sentiment score */,
  "neu" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score */,
  "pos" REAL /* Positive sentiment score */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged for suspicion of fraud */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "review_image_urls" TEXT /* JSON array to store URLs of images attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number) */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the product */,
  "price_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discounted */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "before_price" REAL /* Price before discount */,
  "savings_amount" REAL /* Amount saved with discount */,
  "savings_percent" REAL /* Percentage saved with discount */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the product page */,
  "score" REAL /* Score calculated based on various factors */,
  "sponsored" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is sponsored */,
  "amazon_choice" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is an Amazon Choice */,
  "best_seller" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is a Best Seller */,
  "amazon_prime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is Amazon Prime */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the product thumbnail */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* JSON object to store product specifications */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* JSON object to store the dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "shipping_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product including packaging */,
  "shipping_dimensions" TEXT /* JSON object to store the dimensions of the product including packaging */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the product is manufactured */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability status of the product (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product details were last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array to store tags associated with the product */,
  "related_products" TEXT /* JSON array to store related product IDs */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently discounted */,
  "discount_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "discount_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews by the reviewer */,
  "average_rating_given" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date when the reviewer registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* The date of the reviewer's last activity */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is verified */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method of verification */,
  "registration_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the reviewer registered */,
  "last_activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the reviewer last accessed the platform */,
  "is_seller" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is also a seller on the platform */,
  "seller_id" TEXT /* Reference to the seller ID if the reviewer is a seller */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the reviewer (e.g., power user, casual user) */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object to store the distribution of ratings given by the reviewer (e.g., 5-star, 4-star, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_positions" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product */,
  "page_position" INTEGER /* Page number in search results */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position on the page */,
  "global_position" INTEGER /* Global position in search results */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query that resulted in the product position */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "search_location" TEXT /* Location from which the search was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the search (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sentiment score */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* Reference to the review */,
  "neg" REAL /* Negative sentiment score */,
  "neu" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score */,
  "pos" REAL /* Positive sentiment score */,
  "overall_sentiment" INTEGER /* Overall sentiment score (1: positive, 0: neutral, -1: negative) */,
  "sentiment_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* Reference to the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date when the review was posted */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* Reference to the review */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location from where the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
